Write the following famous Mantra On any Sunday take 22 black
Urad grains and sprinkle them on the floor of your business premiSes
after chanting the Mantra for 22 times.
Om Bhanwar veer Tu Chela Mera !
Khol Dukan Bikra Kar Mera !!
Uthe )on Dandi Bike jo Maaf!
Bhandar Veer 5o Kare Ni'haal !!
Shoukl you encounter much problems in your business, feed atleast
10 blind persons and reverentially service your parents. All the
obstructions and troubles will be removed.
For ensuring growth of your business clean a part of your business
premises with Ganga water and make a Swastik mark on that place
with turmeric paste. Now place on it some grains of 'Chane ld dal:
jaggery, and keep a Oesi ghee burning lamp while praying for your
speedy busin~s growth.
